ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor location */,
  "acx" REAL /* X-axis acceleration value */,
  "acy" REAL /* Y-axis acceleration value */,
  "acz" REAL /* Z-axis acceleration value */,
  "gx" REAL /* X-axis gyroscope value */,
  "gy" REAL /* Y-axis gyroscope value */,
  "gz" REAL /* Z-axis gyroscope value */,
  "press1" INTEGER /* First atmospheric pressure reading */,
  "press2" INTEGER /* Second atmospheric pressure reading */,
  "press3" INTEGER /* Third atmospheric pressure reading */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., accelerometer, gyroscope) */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the sensor */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Signal strength of the sensor */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., good, poor) */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Error code during data collection */,
  "processed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data has been processed (e.g., 0 for raw, 1 for processed) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data schema */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES sensor_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location and its purpose */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the location */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of environment (e.g., urban, rural, industrial) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the location (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the location */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each sensor data record
Unique identifier for each sensor location
Timestamp of when the data was recorded
Type of the device (e.g., accelerometer, gyroscope)
Quality of the data (e.g., good, poor)

Unique identifier for each sensor location
Description of the location and its purpose
Type of environment (e.g., urban, rural, industrial)
Date when the sensor was installed
Date of the next scheduled maintenance
Current status of the location (e.g., active, inactive)
Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer)
Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive)
Timestamp when the user account was created
Timestamp when the user account was last updated
